languages.text: "Что же. Можете гордиться — вы открыли мне глаза. Госпожа фон Валанциус всегда предпочитала действовать через посредников — и это делало ей особую честь в глазах аристократии. Выходит, в этот раз ее орудием стала я". {n}Неестественно-бледное, похожее на маску лицо герцогини Драйвстем прорезает горькая, неприязненная ухмылка.{/n} "Девочка учится у лучших".

traits.locale_text: "Что же. Можете гордиться — вы открыли мне глаза. Госпожа фон Валанциус всегда предпочитала действовать через посредников — и это делало ей особую честь в глазах аристократии. Выходит, в этот раз ее орудием стала я". {n}Неестественно-бледное, похожее на маску лицо герцогини Драйвстем прорезает горькая, неприязненная ухмылка.{/n} "Девочка учится у лучших".

languages.text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."
languages.original_text: "Что же. Можете гордиться — вы открыли мне глаза. Госпожа фон Валанциус всегда предпочитала действовать через посредников — и это делало ей особую честь в глазах аристократии. Выходит, в этот раз ее орудием стала я". {n}Неестественно-бледное, похожее на маску лицо герцогини Драйвстем прорезает горькая, неприязненная ухмылка.{/n} "Девочка учится у лучших".

It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

"Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

languages.text: “好吧。你真是厉害，你让我看清了真相。冯·瓦兰修斯女士向来喜欢借他人之手行事，这种做法反而让贵族们对她格外敬重。看来这一次，我成了她的工具。”{n}达戈努斯女爵那张苍白如面具的脸上，浮现出一抹苦涩而怨毒的假笑。{/n}“那丫头可真是得了高人的真传。”
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

traits.locale_text: “好吧。你真是厉害，你让我看清了真相。冯·瓦兰修斯女士向来喜欢借他人之手行事，这种做法反而让贵族们对她格外敬重。看来这一次，我成了她的工具。”{n}达戈努斯女爵那张苍白如面具的脸上，浮现出一抹苦涩而怨毒的假笑。{/n}“那丫头可真是得了高人的真传。”

languages.text: « Ma foi, vous pouvez être {mf|fier|fière} de vous, car vous m'avez ouvert les yeux. Dame von Valancius a toujours préféré agir par le biais d'intermédiaires, ce qui la pare d'un honneur particulier aux yeux de l'aristocratie. Manifestement, c'était à mon tour de lui servir d'instrument. » {n}Le visage de la duchesse de Dargonus, si pâle qu'il ressemble à un masque, se fend d'un sourire empreint d'amertume et de rancœur.{/n} « Il faut dire qu'elle a eu une excellente professeure. »
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

traits.locale_text: « Ma foi, vous pouvez être {mf|fier|fière} de vous, car vous m'avez ouvert les yeux. Dame von Valancius a toujours préféré agir par le biais d'intermédiaires, ce qui la pare d'un honneur particulier aux yeux de l'aristocratie. Manifestement, c'était à mon tour de lui servir d'instrument. » {n}Le visage de la duchesse de Dargonus, si pâle qu'il ressemble à un masque, se fend d'un sourire empreint d'amertume et de rancœur.{/n} « Il faut dire qu'elle a eu une excellente professeure. »

languages.text: "Güzel. Kendinizi alkışlayabilirsiniz... Gözlerimi açtınız. Leydi von Valancius, her zaman aracılar vasıtasıyla hareket etmeyi tercih etmiştir ve bu da ona aristokrasinin gözünde özel bir saygınlık kazandırmıştır. Görünüşe göre bu sefer maşası bendim." {n}Dargonus Düşesi'nin doğaüstü solukluktaki maske benzeri yüzü, acı ve kızgın bir sırıtışla ikiye bölünüyor.{/n} "En iyisinden öğrenmiş."
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

traits.locale_text: "Güzel. Kendinizi alkışlayabilirsiniz... Gözlerimi açtınız. Leydi von Valancius, her zaman aracılar vasıtasıyla hareket etmeyi tercih etmiştir ve bu da ona aristokrasinin gözünde özel bir saygınlık kazandırmıştır. Görünüşe göre bu sefer maşası bendim." {n}Dargonus Düşesi'nin doğaüstü solukluktaki maske benzeri yüzü, acı ve kızgın bir sırıtışla ikiye bölünüyor.{/n} "En iyisinden öğrenmiş."

languages.text: «Vaya. Puede aplaudirse, porque me ha abierto los ojos. Lady von Valancius siempre ha preferido actuar mediante intermediarios, y eso le da un honor especial a ojos de la aristocracia. Parece que en esta ocasión he sido yo su herramienta». {n}El rostro pálido de la duquesa de Dargonus deja entrever una sonrisa amarga y resentida.{/n} «Esa chica tuvo muy buena maestra».
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

traits.locale_text: «Vaya. Puede aplaudirse, porque me ha abierto los ojos. Lady von Valancius siempre ha preferido actuar mediante intermediarios, y eso le da un honor especial a ojos de la aristocracia. Parece que en esta ocasión he sido yo su herramienta». {n}El rostro pálido de la duquesa de Dargonus deja entrever una sonrisa amarga y resentida.{/n} «Esa chica tuvo muy buena maestra».

languages.text: "Tja. Klopft Euch selbst auf die Schulter ... Ihr habt mir die Augen geöffnet. Lady von Valancius hat stets über Mittelsmänner agiert, was ihr in den Augen der Aristokratie besonderes Ansehen beschert hat. Wie es scheint, war in diesem Fall ich ihr Werkzeug." {n}Das unnatürlich blasse, maskengleiche Gesicht der Herzogin von Dargonus teilt sich zu einem verbitterten Grinsen.{/n} "Das Mädchen hat von den Besten gelernt."
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."

Lady von Valancius hat stets über Mittelsmänner agiert, was ihr in den Augen der Aristokratie besonderes Ansehen beschert hat. Wie es scheint, war in diesem Fall ich ihr Werkzeug." {n}Das unnatürlich blasse, maskengleiche Gesicht der Herzogin von Dargonus teilt sich zu einem verbitterten Grinsen.{/n} "Das Mädchen hat von den Besten gelernt."

languages.text: 「なるほど。ご自身を褒めてあげてください。あなたは私の目を覚まさせてくれました。ヴァランシウス女爵はいつも仲介者を通して行動し、それが貴族の眼に特別な名誉を与えていました。今回は私が彼女の道具だったようです。」{n}ドラゴナス公爵夫人の不自然に蒼白い、仮面のような顔は苦々しい、恨み節の様な笑みに歪む.{/n}「その少女は最高の師から学んだわ。」
languages.original_text: "Well. Pat yourself on the back — you have opened my eyes. Lady von Valancius always preferred to act through intermediaries, and that gave her special honour in the eyes of the aristocracy. It appears that I was her tool this time." {n}The unnaturally pale, mask-like face of the Duchess of Dargonus splits into a bitter, resentful smirk.{/n} "The girl learned from the best."
